'''Ocka Dwei''' was an advance scout for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], serving much the same purpose and function as [[Nom Anor]], [[Yomin Carr]], and various other clandestine operatives of the [[Praetorite Vong]], a secretive power on the edge of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] that served as the spearhead of the intended [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]]. 

==Biography==
Assigned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] sometime after the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he had become an expert in Coruscanti customs and spoke flawless [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] by the dawning of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. [[Ooglith masquer|Disguised]] as a tall, dark-haired young man with a pudgy face, his true form was that of a [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooed]] and mutilated [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warrior.<ref name="CCW" />

Three years before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], Ocka Dwei discovered that the pollen of the [[bafforr tree]] had a toxic effect on [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|vonduun crab armor]], the traditional garb of a [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warrior]]. He began murdering employees of the [[Calocour Heights]]-based ad agency [[Schaum/Yfarg/Welbig/Fabrico and Associates|SchaumAssoc]], whose marketing team had been given miniature bafforr cuttings as product samples from the [[Skydome Botanical Gardens/Legends|Skydome Botanical Gardens]]. He was eventually ferreted out by freelance investigators, but [[Death/Legends|killed]] himself rather than alert the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[infidel]]s to his people's impending invasion.<ref name="CCW" />
